sentences.english: My best childhood memory is going fishing with my grandfather every summer.
sentences.korean: 최고의 어린 시절 기억은 매 여름 할아버지와 낚시 간 거예요.

sentences.english: We would sit by the lake for hours and just talk.
sentences.korean: 호수 옆에 몇 시간이고 앉아서 그냥 이야기했어요.

sentences.english: I remember riding my bike around the neighborhood with my friends after school.
sentences.korean: 학교 끝나고 친구들과 동네를 자전거 타고 다닌 게 기억나요.

sentences.english: My favorite memory is building a tree house with my dad.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 기억은 아빠와 나무 위 오두막을 만든 거예요.

sentences.english: It took us the whole summer, but it was worth it.
sentences.korean: 여름 내내 걸렸지만 그만한 가치가 있었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
